_comment: Ground truth template for hand-labeling. Copy this file to cv_XX.json and fill in based on the corresponding CV. Use null for fields that cannot be extracted from the CV. Use empty arrays [] for list fields where no entries apply. All taxonomy fields must use the exact canonical strings from taxonomy/taxonomy.yaml.
name: <full name as stated>
current_role: <current title or null if between roles>

employment_history.start_date: <YYYY or YYYY-MM or YYYY-MM-DD or null>
employment_history.end_date: <YYYY or YYYY-MM or YYYY-MM-DD or null>
